result.original_query: Which product family had the highest AI relevance score in FY2025 and what was its strategic priority?

normalized_facts.sub_query: Which product family had the highest AI relevance score in FY2025?
normalized_facts.resolved_sub_query: Which product family had the highest AI relevance score in FY2025?
normalized_facts.validated_sql:
SELECT product_family, ai_relevance_score
FROM product_family_signals
WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
  AND ai_relevance_score = (
    SELECT MAX(ai_relevance_score) FROM product_family_signals WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
  )

normalized_facts.sub_query: What was the strategic priority of the product family that had the highest AI relevance score in FY2025?
normalized_facts.resolved_sub_query: What was the strategic priority of the Azure product family in FY2025?
normalized_facts.validated_sql:
SELECT product_family, strategic_priority
FROM product_family_signals
WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
  AND product_family = 'Azure'
